data.content: 1. Child review ed42 found that ../foolery/src/lib/backends/knots-backend.ts only falls back to legacy acceptance notes when the acceptance property is absent. The new knots core serializes acceptance as null when unset, so old note-backed acceptance is still lost on read. 2. Child review 28b1 found the foolery coverage does not exercise that acceptance:null shape, so the backward-compat regression is not caught by the added tests.
